title: Chat Control 1.0 and 2.0 Explained
summary: This content explains the EU's proposed 'Chat Control' regulations (1.0 and 2.0), which mandate client-side scanning of private messages for illegal content, raising significant privacy and security concerns. The discussion on Hacker News critiques the technical feasibility, encryption-breaking implications, and potential for mass surveillance, highlighting the tension between law enforcement and digital rights.
